introSection:
10 Inversion Roller Coaster was an Intamin steel roller coaster located at Chimelong Paradise in Panyu, Guangzhou, Guangdong, China. This ride is a clone of Colossus at Thorpe Park, which was the first roller coaster with ten inversions.

The coaster closed in 2025.
fullText:
10 Inversion Roller Coaster was an Intamin steel roller coaster located at Chimelong Paradise in Panyu, Guangzhou, Guangdong, China. This ride is a clone of Colossus at Thorpe Park, which was the first roller coaster with ten inversions.

The coaster closed in 2025.

Orange track and blue supports.
